Klasse GAController<T>

java.lang.Object
de.fhdwhannover.integrea.controller.GAController<T>
Typparameter:
T - The gene type used in the chromosomes of the population (e.g., Integer, Character).
public class GAController<T> extends Object
Universal Controller encapsulating the execution context of a Genetic Algorithm cycle.

This class operates as the principal orchestrator, taking the loaded genetic operators from the GeneticAlgorithm engine and merging them with the domain-specific logic housed inside a GAProblem. It actively loops through evaluation, sorting, and survival steps until the hard cap (maxGenerations) or problem-specific limits are breached.

It also manages internal Convergence Wall logic: detecting when fitness plateaus and artificially mutating the population to break out of local optimums.

    Konstruktor

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • GAController

      public GAController(GAProblem<T> problem, GeneticAlgorithm<T> ga, int populationSize, int maxGenerations, ConsoleOutput consoleOutput)
      Constructs the universal GAController.

      Note: Direct instantiation is discouraged unless building a custom integration. The preferred method is routing AppConfig through ControllerFactory.

      Parameter:
      problem - The specific problem definition implementing GAProblem (handles data and parsing).
      ga - The GeneticAlgorithm core engine pre-configured with selection, crossover, and mutation operators.
      populationSize - The size of the population. Must be > 0.
      maxGenerations - The absolute threshold of evolutionary loops to run before hard-terminating. Must be > 0.
      consoleOutput - The UI/Logging hook used to print generational telemetry and errors.

  • Methodendetails

    • setResetThreshold

      public void setResetThreshold(int resetThreshold)

    • setResetPercentage

      public void setResetPercentage(double resetPercentage)

    • getPopulation

      public Population<T> getPopulation()
      Retrieves the current, actively evolving population.
      Gibt zurück:
      The population instance representing the active generation.

    • getProblem

      public GAProblem<T> getProblem()
      Retrieves the specific mathematical problem instance bounds to this controller.
      Gibt zurück:
      The injected GAProblem structure.

    • saveState

      public void saveState(String filePath, String problemType) throws IOException
      Saves the current evolutionary state to the specified file using JSON.
      Parameter:
      filePath - The path where the state file will be saved.
      problemType - The generic string identifier for the active problem type.
      Löst aus:
      IOException - If writing the file fails.

    • setExportPath

      public void setExportPath(String exportPath, String problemType)
      Loads the evolutionary state from the specified JSON file, restoring the population and generation counter, bypassing the standard random initialization.
      Parameter:
      exportPath - The path to the saved state file.
      problemType - The Type of the problem

    • loadState

      public void loadState(String filePath) throws IOException
      Löst aus:
      IOException

    • initialize

      protected void initialize()
      Initializes the GA before the evolutionary loop begins. Implementations must:
      • create or configure the GA instance
      • generate the initial population
      • reset the generation counter if needed

    • evaluate

      protected void evaluate()
      Evaluates the current population. Implementations must:
      • compute fitness values for all individuals
      • track the best individual if desired
      • log progress or intermediate results

    • shouldTerminate

      protected boolean shouldTerminate()
      Determines whether the GA should terminate. Typical termination conditions include:
      • maximum number of generations reached
      • fitness threshold achieved
      • no improvement over several generations
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the GA should stop, otherwise false

    • run

      public final void run()
      Executes the full GA lifecycle:
      1. initialization
      2. repeated evaluation and evolution
      3. termination and finalization
      This method is final to ensure consistent GA execution flow across all controllers.

    • onFinish

      protected void onFinish()
      Called once after the GA terminates. Subclasses may override this method to output results, export data, or perform cleanup tasks.

      The default implementation does nothing.
